title: Name Property (GUI Builder)
description: Gets the name of a form or control at runtime. Used to set the Name of a form or control at design time.
see_also:
Applies To

Form, Button, Label, TextBox, RadioButton, CheckBox, ListBox, ComboBox, PictureBox, GroupBox, Timer, VideoBox, LED, ProgressBar, TrackBar StatusBar, Grid
